name: mhc_class_I_chr1
description: Zebrafish MHC: non-classical mhc class Ia/Ib paralogs on chr1 (mhc1zba) — class I genes dispersed across multiple chromosomes (chr1, chr3, chr8, chr19) unlike mammals where they are co-located. Unlike tetrapods, zebrafish MHC class I and class II are unlinked and dispersed across multiple chromosomes — the canonical 'MHC region' concept does not apply. Each subfamily has 5-30 paralogs with intra-cluster identity 75-95%. High population polymorphism: >100 alleles described per locus.
